metadata.title: Wan 2.6 - AI Video Generator | Marble AI
metadata.description: Wan 2.6 by Alibaba. Latest AI video model offering affordable multi-shot 1080p generation with stable characters and synchronized native audio. Supports T2V, I2V, and reference-guided modes.

hero.title: Wan 2.6
hero.description: Alibaba's latest AI video model. Affordable multi-shot 1080p generation with stable characters and synchronized native audio.

introduce.title: About Wan 2.6
introduce.label: Model Overview
introduce.description: Wan 2.6 is Alibaba's latest AI video model, offering affordable multi-shot 1080p generation with stable characters and synchronized native audio. Through the Wan 2.6 API—including T2V, I2V, and reference-guided modes—you can create up to 15-second cinematic videos.

items.title: Affordable Generation
items.description: Cost-effective video generation without compromising quality.

items.title: Multi-Shot Support
items.description: Create cohesive multi-shot videos with stable characters.

items.title: Native Audio
items.description: Synchronized native audio including speech and ambient sounds.

items.title: 15-Second Output
items.description: Generate cinematic videos up to 15 seconds in length.

features.title: Key Features
features.description: Discover what makes Wan 2.6 a leading AI video generation model.

items.title: Text To Video
items.description: Generate stunning videos from text descriptions with cinematic quality.

items.title: Image To Video
items.description: Transform static images into dynamic video content with natural motion.

items.title: Reference Guided
items.description: Use reference images or videos to guide generation style.

items.title: Audio Generation
items.description: Generate synchronized audio including speech and ambient sounds.

items.title: 1080p HD Output
items.description: High-resolution video output up to 1080p with exceptional detail.

items.title: Commercial License
items.description: Full commercial rights for all generated videos.

use-cases.title: Use Cases
use-cases.description: Explore the diverse applications of Wan 2.6.

items.title: Marketing Videos
items.description: Create engaging marketing content with affordable generation.

items.title: Social Media
items.description: Generate viral-ready content for TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube.

items.title: Product Demos
items.description: Showcase products with professional video presentations.

items.title: Storytelling
items.description: Create multi-shot narratives with stable characters.

items.title: Music Videos
items.description: Create music videos with synchronized audio and visuals.

items.title: Educational Content
items.description: Produce engaging educational videos with clear visuals.

items.title: What is Wan 2.6?
items.description: Wan 2.6 is Alibaba's latest AI video model offering affordable multi-shot 1080p generation with native audio.

items.title: What generation modes does it support?
items.description: Wan 2.6 supports Text To Video (T2V), Image To Video (I2V), and reference-guided generation modes.

items.title: Who created Wan 2.6?
items.description: Wan 2.6 is created by Alibaba, a leading technology company.

items.title: What makes it unique?
items.description: Wan 2.6 excels at affordable generation, multi-shot support, and synchronized native audio.

items.title: Can I use it commercially?
items.description: Yes! All videos generated with Wan 2.6 through Marble AI come with full commercial rights.

items.title: How long can the videos be?
items.description: Wan 2.6 can generate videos up to 15 seconds with professional quality and native audio.

cta.title: Ready to Try Wan 2.6?
cta.description: Experience Alibaba's latest AI video generation. Create affordable cinematic videos with native audio.
